summary: Tested Admin Analytics 'God Mode' Platform Mission Control. All 3 analytics endpoints working: /api/admin/analytics/financial (credit liability, revenue), /api/admin/analytics/ecosystem (role distribution, booking efficiency, spot heatmap), /api/admin/analytics/price-impact (signup trends). Frontend Analytics tab displays all data correctly. Scheduler has platform_metrics job registered (6hr interval). Fixed missing AsyncSessionLocal import in scheduler.py.

minor.issue: AsyncSessionLocal was not imported - fixed by using async_session_maker

critical_code_review_comments: platform_metrics table was missing - created during testing
scheduler.py used AsyncSessionLocal which wasn't imported - fixed to use async_session_maker
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Analytics tab fully working. Financial Oversight shows $700 credit liability, 244 users. Ecosystem Health shows role categories (53.3% Surfers, 27.5% Working Pros), 100% Scheduled bookings. Scheduler job 'platform_metrics' runs every 6 hours. PlatformMetrics table created.
